name: VibeBluetooth
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or extend the VibeWidget macOS SwiftUI app and widget. Use when Codex needs to work on a VibeWidget or VibeBluetooth workspace, especially the repo app at `apps/vibe-widget`; regenerate the Xcode project; launch it in Xcode; run local doctor, build, or typecheck checks; or modify the HomeKit, Spotify, widget, voice panel, or shared-core flows.
short_description: Run and extend the VibeWidget macOS app, widget, and shared core.
audience: Builders maintaining the VibeWidget macOS app and WidgetKit extension
Mac users shaping a compact HomeKit, Spotify, voice, and output-routing control surface
Teams keeping app-group state, parser tests, and credential storage boundaries clear
detail_lines: Keeps app, widget, shared core, parser tests, and runner commands represented as one VibeWidget maintenance workflow.
Owns HomeKit, Spotify, voice panel, widget, and output-routing app work while avoiding private Bluetooth pairing or control automation.
Keeps OpenAI and Spotify credentials in Keychain and preserves compile-safe local validation for unsigned developer builds.
